overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a robed character exploring a gothic castle interior at night. The character traverses grand halls, spiral staircases, and corridors lined with portraits and suits of armor, encountering a ghostly figure while moving through candlelit stone hallways with high vaulted ceilings.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand entrance hall with spiral staircase and stone pillars

events.description: character begins ascending the spiral staircase

agents.ego_description: walking through the grand hall toward and climbing the spiral staircase

entered.detail: large cylindrical stone columns supporting the vaulted ceiling
elegant stone spiral staircase winding upward
tall gothic arched windows with diamond-patterned glass
ornate wall-mounted lanterns casting warm light

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a grand gothic hall with massive stone pillars and a high vaulted ceiling. Warm light from wall sconces illuminates the stone architecture as the character approaches and begins ascending an elegant spiral staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: portrait-lined corridor with wooden paneling and stairs

events.description: character begins descending the staircase in the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow corridor lined with framed portraits while descending stairs

entered.detail: framed portraits hanging on the walls in ornate frames
dark wooden paneling covering the lower walls

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrower corridor adorned with portrait paintings and dark wooden wainscoting. The space transitions from the open hall to an enclosed passageway as the character descends a flight of stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor with suits of armor leading to grand fireplace room

events.description: character enters the room with the large fireplace from the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking past suits of armor toward the fireplace room at the end of the corridor

entered.detail: full suits of medieval armor standing on display
massive stone fireplace with mantelpiece and decorative surround
wooden bench positioned against the wall

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds down a corridor lined with suits of armor, transitioning into a room dominated by a large stone fireplace. The warm glow from wall sconces highlights the medieval decor and wooden furnishings.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower level corridor with gothic windows and benches

events.description: translucent ghostly figure appears and passes by on the left side

agents.ego_description: descending stairs and walking through the long lower corridor, passing a ghostly figure

notable_agents.action: translucent ghostly figure floating past the character in the corridor

entered.detail: wooden benches lining the left side of the corridor
tall arched windows with dark glass showing night outside
large wooden door at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character descends from the fireplace room into a lower corridor where a translucent ghost suddenly appears and floats past. The long hallway features tall gothic windows, wooden benches, and leads toward a large wooden door at the far end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gothic castle that transitions from grand, open architecture into narrow, haunted corridors. It begins in a massive hall with high vaulted ceilings and stone pillars, moving forward as the character ascends an elegant spiral staircase. The scene then shifts into a more enclosed passageway adorned with portrait paintings and dark wooden wainscoting before descending a flight of stairs. As the camera proceeds, the corridor opens into a room dominated by a large stone fireplace and suits of armor, where the warm glow of wall sconces highlights the medieval furnishings. Finally, the movement leads down into a lower hallway featuring tall gothic windows and wooden benches, where a translucent ghost suddenly floats past as the camera heads toward a large wooden door.
